synthesis: Mobius closed the cycle in green posture with GI at 0.81. The ledger registered 7 events over the last 24 hours, with the strongest visible signal in ENVIRON at 0.877 even as ATLAS heartbeat readings stayed volatile across a 0.63-0.90 range. ZEUS verification status remains disputed, reflecting unresolved divergence between heartbeat and live integrity layers. Forward signal: watch whether institutional alignment closes the remaining gap between ATLAS heartbeat GI and the live integrity layers in the next cycle.
